CustomField.description: HTTP header carrying the request signature on inbound webhook calls (e.g. Stripe-Signature, X-Hub-Signature-256). Verified by DeliveryWebhookReceiverApi against SignatureSecretTxt__c using SignatureAlgorithmTxt__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: HTTP header name that carries the inbound webhook signature.
CustomField.label: Signature Header
